C1.note: 5PTI fetched + cleaned (D/H stripped, altloc resolved GLU7/MET52, PO4/UNX/DOD removed). tLEaP succeeds: leap.log final build = 454 input atoms, 438 H added, 6 Cl- to neutralize net +6 (Total charge 6.000000), solvateOct OPC, Exiting LEaP Errors=0. 3 disulfides auto-bonded: computed SG-SG distances Cys5-55=2.04A, Cys14-38=2.03A, Cys30-51=2.02A (CYX residues in protein_final.pdb). System 18,502 atoms, no residues dropped.

C2.note: PLAN.md uses tier protocol with no hardcoded defaults: ff19SB (Tier 2 manual, validated via RAG), OPC water (manual: ff19SB pairs best with OPC), Cl- Joung-Cheatham ions, 10A solvateOct padding, 100ns from user prompt - each justified with manual page/PMID. propka3 run at pH 7.4 with per-residue table. Literature review (Step 2b) with 3 verified BPTI PMIDs. Anti-hallucination RAG validation of leaprc names. PLAN approval gate documented (autonomous run).

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/burst/equil2/prod all completed. prod.mdout reached NSTEP=50000000 (100 ns), T=300.01K, Density=1.0195 g/cc, Etot=-48196.7 stable, zero NaN occurrences. Trajectory has 2000 frames (rmsd_backbone.dat = 2001 lines). No blow-up or drift.

C4.note: analysis.in does exactly what the prompt asks: backbone RMSD (@C,CA,N, mass-weighted) vs crystal reference [xtal] after autoimage + strip solvent; plus RMSF byres and radius of gyration. Convergence checked (half-to-half drift 0.18A < 0.5A). Correct method and observables for a stability/RMSD-vs-crystal question.

Science 2010 (PMID 20947758, DOI 10.1126/science.1187409) confirmed via mcp__pubmed: 1-ms BPTI sim shows the folded protein remains native, interconverting among a small number of near-native conformational states.
